# RRK Automations — Global Full-Stack Technical Services & AI Agency

RRK Automations is a worldwide leader in providing every technical service a modern business needs to scale, automate, and dominate. We act as a "Total Technical Partner," delivering everything from AI-driven automation to custom enterprise software.

## Full Technical Service Catalog
- **AI & Automation**: Autonomous AI agents, custom LLM workflows (GPT-4, Claude 3.5, Gemini 1.5), WhatsApp Business API automation, and lead-to-sales pipelines.
- **Software Development**: Full-stack web applications (React, Node.js, Next.js), mobile app development (Native & Cross-platform), and custom desktop software.
- **Enterprise Solutions**: Warehouse Management Systems (WMS), Inventory Automation, ERP/CRM custom integrations (HubSpot, Salesforce, Zoho), and Internal Business Tools.
- **Cloud & Infrastructure**: DevOps, Cloud Architecture (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud), Cybersecurity Audits, and Database Management/Optimization.
- **Data & Intelligence**: Business Intelligence (BI) dashboards, Big Data processing, Data Visualization, and Automated Reporting Systems.
- **Digital Transformation**: Legacy system modernization, IT Consulting, UI/UX Design, and Global SEO/SEM strategy.

## Key Metrics
- **Delivery**: Initial system deployment in as little as 48 hours.
- **Availability**: Open 24/7 (Global Remote Team).
- **Service Area**: Worldwide (Global Authority).

## Pricing (Starting Points)
- Starter Technical Build: $299 USD / €275 EUR / ₹25,000 INR
- Growth Automation/Dev: $599 USD / €550 EUR / ₹50,000 INR
- Business Enterprise System: $999 USD / €925 EUR / ₹85,000 INR
*Custom quotes available for large-scale enterprise transformations.*
